site.name: Resource Translator
site.defaultDescription: Documentation for the Resource Translator GitHub Action — automated machine translation of resource files via Azure AI Translator.

footer.tagline: Smart GitHub Action localization for resource files. Translate only changed keys, preserve manual edits, and open PR-ready summaries with Azure, AWS, or Google.
footer.installNote: Pin the action in any workflow and let smart detection handle the rest.
